name: ruby-os
title: ruby-os
summary: Simple and easy way to know if you're on windows or not (reliably)
description:
Simple and easy way to know if you're on windows or not (reliably)
It also tells how many bits the OS is, etc.
.
The OS library allows for some useful and easy functions, like OS.windows?
(=> true or false) OS.bits ( => 32 or 64) etc"
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-os because Simple and easy way to know if you're on windows or not (reliably).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-os as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-os with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-os --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
